# 发布治理

## 概览

这里的总览不属于角色快照。

## 审批角色

| role_id | email | required | enabled |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| security-reviewer | SECURITY-REVIEWER@example.com | false | true |
| disabled-role | disabled@example.com | true | false |
| release-manager | release-manager@example.com | true | true |

## 其他章节

| role_id | email | required | enabled |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ignored-role | ignored@example.com | true | true |
